title: TNT Arrows
description: Adds a crafting recipe for explosive arrows
body:
# TNT Arrows
Adds a craftable arrow that explodes upon a collision. The crafting recipe is very accessible and balances, unlocked when getting a tnt or arrow

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27f3e9ba530112ea791b33595db2fb8656b12add.png)

## Ressource Pack
There is an optionnal ressource pack to add a texture to the arrow you can find [here.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tnt-arrows-ressource-pack)
